AccessLegacyPartnerCentral.description: Grants permission to Single Sign-On from AWS Partner Central into Legacy Partner Central

AccessMarketingCentral.description: Grants permission to Single Sign-On from AWS Partner Central into Marketing Central

AccessProServeTools.description: Grants permission to Single Sign-On from AWS Partner Central into ProServe Tools

AssociatePartnerAccount.description: Grants permission to associate Partner account to AWS account

AssociatePartnerUser.description: Grants permission to associate Partner user to IAM role

DisassociatePartnerUser.description: Grants permission to disassociate Partner user to IAM role

partnercentral-account-management:Legacy.description: Filters access by the Legacy Partner Central role

partnercentral-account-management:Market.description: Filters access by Marketing Central role

partnercentral-account-management:ProSer.description: Filters access by ProServe Tools role
